info.title: SplitWiseMoney API
info.description: SplitWiseMoney - Expense sharing web application API documentation

tags.name: Expenses
tags.description: Endpoints for managing group expenses and participant splits

tags.name: Settlements
tags.description: Endpoints for debt simplification calculations and payment tracking

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints for user registration and login

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user alerts and notifications

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user profile and settings

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Endpoints for user financial overview metrics

tags.name: Groups
tags.description: Endpoints for managing group configurations and group memberships

tags.name: History
tags.description: Endpoints for user activity logs history

get.summary: Get current logged in user details

put.summary: Mark a pending settlement payment as SETTLED

get.summary: Get specific group details by ID
List all recorded settlement transactions in a group

post.summary: Record a settlement payment between group members
Mark all notifications for the current user as read

get.summary: List all groups associated with the current user
Get all member users in a group

post.summary: Add a user member to a group by their registered email

get.summary: Get paginated list of group expenses

post.summary: Add a new expense to a group
Authenticate user and return JWT bearer token

get.summary: Calculate simplified owed debts for members of a group (minimum transactions)
Get count of unread notifications for current user
Get paginated user activity logs history
Get user summary statistics (total paid, owed, receive, group counts, recent logs)

delete.summary: Remove a user member from a group
